results.title: Senior Data Scientist - Marketplace - Amsterdam, Nederland - Booking.com
highlights:
## Senior Data Scientist - Marketplace
...
We are hiring two Senior Data Scientists in the Marketplace Department at Booking.com, each aligned to a distinct sub-scope:
...
* Loyalty \& Incentives Insights: We drive the strategy of our Genius and Incentives programs through rigorous experimentation and incrementality measurement. We aim to understand traveler loyalty and build scalable frameworks that optimize our commercial incentives, working in close collaboration with ML and Product stakeholders * Trip Management \& Order Insights: We focus on improving the traveler experience by providing the right help when needed and enabling communication between travelers, partners, and customer service. We build scalable product solutions - including GenAI-powered ones - to the most significant and persistent decision-making challenges in the trip management space.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist in either sub-scope, you will work autonomously on impactful strategic business problems, translating them into data stories and delivering insights that inform business decisions across multiple products. You will design and interpret experiments to guide long-term strategic decisions, build proofs of concept and prototypes, and actively manage stakeholders from operational to Senior Director level. You'll collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, and Data Engineering teams, writing high-quality, reproducible code to ensure your work lands impactfully and enables solid decision-making across leadership.

results.title: Booking Holdings AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Booking Holdings has positioned itself as a leader in retail AI transformation through its aggressive adoption of generative AI across its travel platforms[1]. The company operates five major brands - Booking.com, Priceline, Kayak, Agoda, and OpenTable - each deploying various AI tools to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency[2]. CEO Glenn Fogel describes 2026 as potentially transformational for AI in travel, comparing the current moment to the dot-com boom excitement of 25 years ago[3]. Booking Holdings is partnering with major AI companies including OpenAI, Microsoft, Google, and Amazon to develop agentic AI experiences that could make travel planning as seamless as having a human travel agent[4]. The company reported early positive results from its AI initiatives in Q3 2025, with tools driving faster search, better conversion rates, lower cancellation rates, and higher customer satisfaction[5].
...

Notably, Customer Service leads AI requirements at 37.5%, reflecting the company's focus on AI-powered customer support tools. While tech roles show expected AI adoption at 21.4%, the 11.9% rate in non-tech roles indicates growing organizational AI fluency beyond traditional technical functions.

How is Booking Holdings using AI to compete with Google and
...
tech giants?
...
Booking Holdings is developing agentic AI experiences that leverage its proprietary travel data to offer more personalized recommendations than general LLMs. The company partners with AI giants while building specialized travel AI that can outperform generic chatbots through deep domain expertise and 25+ years of booking data.
...
What makes Booking
...
AI strategy different
...
Booking takes a hybrid approach using small, specialized models for fast inference and larger LLMs for reasoning. The company built agentic behaviors before the term existed and focuses on measurable business outcomes like conversion rates and customer satisfaction rather than just deploying AI for its own sake.
...

...
a threat, comparing it to

people discover travel, positioning

Customers get AI Trip Planner, Smart Filter, Property Q&A, AI Trip Support, and voice-powered booking assistance. Partners receive Smart Messenger and Auto-Reply for guest communication, plus operational AI tools. Both sides benefit from enhanced efficiency and personalization through Booking's integrated AI ecosystem.

Exciting tech news: you can now search for accommodations on Booking.com directly in Claude. 

We are continually innovating to better serve travelers, and our partnership with Anthropic is just one example of how we’re leveraging advanced AI to enhance both value and experience for our customers. 

Check out what that experience will look like: Claude can now connect to more of the apps you use outside of work, including Tripadvisor , Booking.com , Resy , Instacart , Spotify , Audible , AllTrails , Thumbtack , Intuit TurboTax , and more.
...

results.title: Bruno Passos
highlights:
GenAI Engineering Innovation Lead at [Booking.com](https://www.linkedin.com/company/booking.com)
...
I lead at the intersection of Developer Experience and AI Enablement — helping large engineering organizations adopt, measure, and scale the impact of AI. At Booking.com, I’ve spent the past 8 years shaping the developer experience for 4,000+ engineers and 3,000+ services, driving initiatives from replatforming legacy systems to building AI adoption frameworks. Most recently, I’ve led our exploration of GenAI in engineering, designing the AI Engineering Platform that makes AI usable, safe, and measurable at scale. My focus areas include: • AI Developer Experience: defining golden paths for AI-assisted coding, troubleshooting, and automation. • Impact Measurement: creating frameworks that go beyond dashboards to measure productivity, DORA outcomes, and true ROI of AI. • Enterprise Adoption: building repeatable patterns and playbooks to bring AI into complex engineering environments. • Change Leadership: connecting executives, researchers, and engineers to drive adoption that delivers real value. I believe the future of software development will be AI-native, and my goal is to help shape the platforms, practices, and metrics that get us there. If you’re working on AI developer tools, AI platforms, or adoption strategy, I’d love to connect and exchange perspectives.
...
#### GenAI Engineering Innovation Lead (Current)
...
I spearhead the exploration and integration of Generative AI (GenAI) technologies to revolutionize developer productivity across Booking.com. This role combines strategic leadership, partner and stakeholder managment with hands-on collaboration, fostering innovation in how we deliver high-quality, scalable software solutions for millions of customers worldwide.
...
Led the team responsible for the strategy and rollout of Booking.com’s stack modernization from a monolithic Perl stack with tools built in house to a 3 layers stack (Reactive framework for the front-end, NodeJS for server-side rendering of our FE and separation of our BE into end-points to be transformed into services). This included proof of concepts to validate the technical change as well as rollout of strategy for the Partner side of Booking.com as well as a major change to Booking.com’s culture of development, including automated tests, code review and pair programming, which resulted in the beginning of a company-wide tech transformation
...

Winner of AI hackathon (10,000€ prize) for an autonomous model train, capable of emergency breaking and real-time decision-making exclusively through streamed visual information via object classification and tracking.
...
Top 10 finish (6th out of 3303) The goal of this competition was to forecast the daily sales for 1000+ Rossmann stores. I've engineered many new features and trained some XGBoost models. My final submission was a blending of 5 XGBoosts with different parameters, together with a XGBoost within a time series approach, with extra features calculated out of the sales from the previous days. I've used as the cross validation data the last 6 weeks of the training data, in order to resemble the testing conditions. This turned out to work quite well, and was very indicative of the final score. I've used spot instances in the Amazon Web Services to pre process the data and to train the different models. Show less
...
### Kaggle competition: "Galaxy Zoo - The Galaxy Challenge"
...

results.title: Berk Gökden
highlights:
Machine Learning Engineer at [Booking.com](https://www.linkedin.com/company/booking.com)
...
I build production data and AI systems end-to-end—fast and cost-efficiently. As a full-stack engineer, I handle everything from data infrastructure to multi-agent AI systems to production deployment. I've shipped systems at Klarna, Booking.com, and ING that process millions of transactions daily. At Klarna, I built AI agent systems serving 5,000+ employees across multiple use cases: meeting intelligence (40% efficiency improvement), conversational agents with voice capabilities, automated feedback systems, internal search infrastructure, and workflow automation integrating with Slack and project management tools. Previously led engineering at Vamp.io (acquired by CircleCI) managing a 12-person team on large-scale cloud-native projects. My background spans the full stack: data infrastructure (pipelines, warehouses, feature stores), ML systems (RAG, LLMs, multi-agent architectures, conversational AI), and production deployment (Kubernetes, distributed systems). I've contributed to vector search libraries like Annoy, built systems in Go/Python/TypeScript, and deployed production solutions with PostgreSQL+pgvector and FAISS. Open source: → veri - feature store in Go (54+ stars) → llama-constrain - constrained LLM generation → Annoy - vector search (contributor) → Various AI/ML and data engineering tools Currently available for consulting and fractional CTO work. If you need someone who can build data/AI systems end-to-end or lead technical teams through growth, let's connect. Email: berkgokden@gmail.com Phone: +31 62 719 89 52

results.title: Aurelius Zilko
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist @ Booking.com | PhD in Applied Mathematics
...
Senior Data Scientist at [Booking.com](https://www.linkedin.com/company/booking.com)
...
Dr. Ir. Aurelius Zilko currently works as a Senior Data Scientist at Booking.com. Through his tenure at the company, he has broad and versatile experience from working with and in multiple product and data teams across multiple departments where he got to apply his strong analytical, statistics, experimentation, and machine learning skills. With his very strong communication skill, he collaborates with various roles in many different projects and has consistently brought successful data-driven impact through his excellent business acumen. In 2017, he earned his PhD degree in applied mathematics from Delft University of Technology, the Netherlands. He completed the degree in four years under the SmartOCCR research project that was jointly organized by ProRail and NWO. In 2012, he obtained a cum-laude Master's degree in applied mathematics, also from TU Delft, which he finished in two years with the Risk and Environmental Modelling scholarship. In 2010, he finished his cum-laude Bachelor's degree in mathematics from Parahyangan University, Indonesia, after seven semesters with the Talent & Interest scholarship. He was also actively involved in various organizational activities during his undergraduate years, with the highlight being his appointment as the chairman of Unpar's mathematics students association for the 2008-2009 period.
...

Systems for Travel Booking at Agoda

# Senior Data Scientist - LLM Systems for Travel Booking
...
Design, build, and own end-to-end LLM-based systems for multi-step trip planning and booking at Agoda scale. Translate open-ended product problems into production ML solutions with rigorous evaluation and iteration. Partner with product, engineering, and leadership to make technical and product decisions that directly impact millions of travelers.
...
Own LLM systems from intent understanding to booking across flights, hotels, and activities
...
Build production LLM systems with RAG, tool/agent orchestration, and context management
...
Own end-to-end LLM systems: design, build, and operate LLM-based systems from understanding user intent to planning multi-step trips and invoking internal systems to search, price, and book
...
Turn ambiguity into production solutions: translate open-ended product problems into concrete ML and LLM designs while balancing quality, latency, cost, and reliability
...
Drive cross-functional decisions: partner closely with product, engineering, and leadership to make informed trade-offs that shape product and user experience
...
Iterate with real-world
...
Data Science Modeling Feature Engineering Statistics Experimentation LLM systems RAG Tool/Agent Orchestration Context and Memory Management Evaluation Testing Iteration
...
About AgodaAt Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.Get to Know Our TeamAgoda, part of Booking Holdings, operates at the cutting edge of tech innovation. Work and build LLM-powered features that enable users to seamlessly book flights, hotels, and activities in an all-in-one experience.Build solutions operating directly in real booking flows at Agoda scale. You’ll have real ownership over how the system is designed, built, and evolved, with the freedom to make meaningful technical and product decisions from day one.This role is ideal for senior Data Scientists or ML practitioners who enjoy owning complex systems end-to-end and working at the intersection of ML, product, and engineering.What You'll Do
...
- Own end-to-end LLM systems: Design, build, and own LLM-based systems, from understanding user intent to planning multi-step trips and invoking internal systems to search, price, and book.
...
- Turn ambiguity into production solutions: Translate open-ended product problems into concrete ML and LLM designs, balancing quality, latency, cost, and reliability in a real-world environment.
...
- Drive cross-functional decisions: Partner closely with product, engineering, and leadership to make informed trade-offs that directly shape the product and user experience.
...
- Iterate with real-world feedback: Ship quickly, learn from production usage, and continuously improve system behavior at scale.
...
- Technical depth: Strong hands-on Data Science experience, including modeling, feature engineering, statistics, and experimentation.
...
- LLM systems and evaluation: Experience building and operating production LLM systems (e.g., RAG, tool/agent orchestration, context and memory management), with a strong focus on evaluation, testing, and iteration — or the ability to ramp up quickly in parts of this space.
...
Category Data Science

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
...
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures

- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems

- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb’s content integrity defenses, helping define the long-term vision for the role of AI-driven content understanding across the Trust ecosystem.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)

results.title: Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning | Wfh
highlights:
Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning | Wfh
...
# Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
...
### About the role:
...
Angi is seeking an exceptional Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning to be a driving force behind Angi's transformation. The role is to be a leader in our Artificial Intelligence team, tackling challenges such as integrating Angi's search with LLM Providers like OpenAI GPT and Google Gemini. This is a leadership role, leading a team of dedicated machine learning engineers to both develop ML prototypes and then take them to production. In addition to being a leader, we're also looking for someone who can dive into tech and get their hands dirty to solve some of Angi's biggest technical challenges.
...
- Leadership: Lead and grow a team of talented machine learning engineers, providing guidance, mentorship, and support to foster professional growth. For our most complex challenges, you will dive into the tech to work through solutioning alongside your team.
...
- LLM Deployment and Optimization: Oversee the fine-tuning and deployment of LLMs, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in an agentic framework, with a focus on optimizing model performance and scalability to enhance user experience and drive business results.
...
- Integration with 3rd Party AI APIs: Oversee the integration and management of AI tools and third-party solutions, including OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, Meta AI, and Salesforce AI, to enhance user experience and business performance.
...
- Engineering & Product Collaboration: Partner with engineering, product, and design teams to build robust, scalable real-time APIs, and work on the entire development process to seamlessly integrate AI solutions into our products.
...
- Innovation: Foster innovation within the team, exploring new approaches and techniques to solve complex business problems.
...
- Who you are
...
- You have a Master's or Ph.D. in a computer science or quantitative field (e.g., Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields).
- You have 10+ years of experience in machine learning & engineering, with a focus on large-scale distributed application architecture for deploying ML models to production.
- You are an expert in machine learning deployment, API development, and real-time ML workloads.
- You are proficient in Python and comfortable diving deep into technical challenges alongside your team.
- You have excellent communication skills with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
...
Our hiring process may utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools to assist in candidate screening and assessment. Our AI tools are designed to complement, not replace, human decision-making.

# Data Scientist (100%)
...
## Drive innovation in machine learning and AI, from research to deployment, creating scalable intelligent systems that power the next generation of scientific discovery.
...
Are you passionate about turning complex data into intelligent, production-ready solutions while supporting the future of open-access science? We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team and help design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning solutions that power intelligent, data-driven products. This role focuses on NLP, recommender systems, and agentic LLM workflows, turning complex business challenges into scalable and impactful analytical solutions.
...
This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of machine learning and AI, contributing to innovative systems that leverage state-of-the-art research in practical applications.
...
Core Responsibilities
...
Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning and statistical models, with a focus on NLP, recommender systems, and LLM-based solutions.
...
Translate business problems into data-driven approaches and scalable analytical solutions.
...
Perform data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for modeling.
...
Develop, optimize, and benchmark models using appropriate metrics and validation strategies.
...
Build and experiment with LLM-powered systems, including agentic workflows and RAG.
...
Investigate, reproduce, and compare research prototypes and state-of-the-art methods.
...
Collaborate with engineering teams to support the integration of models into production.
...
Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.
...
Bachelor’s degree/ Master's degree in Computer Science or related.
...
2-5 years of experience as a Data Scientist.
...
2–5 years of experience in Python (including complex applications), Machine Learning, and LLMs.
...
Strong background in data science, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.
...
Intermediate proficiency in FastAPI, Celery, and Keycloak.
...
Intermediate proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face.
...
Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP), including tokenization and named entity recognition (NER).
...
In-depth understanding of Artificial Intelligence principles.
...
Strong working knowledge of Microsoft O365 tools.
